content_body:
I cannot give this company the amount of stars it deserves! I scheduled a reunion for group of 82nd Airborne Veterans that served in Desert Shield/Desert Storm and when I started speaking with Taylor I knew I had found the perfect place for these great gentlemen! From start to finish, they were amazing to work with, accommodating, and the property is gorgeous! We rented two cabins (Serendipity and Cherokee Sunrise) and they were perfect. Taylor and her family placed a beautiful card in the cabin thanking these gentlemen for their service and that touched each one of them. They spent three days enjoying each other and the beautiful view that comes with these cabins. ❤️

This will be the first of a yearly reunion and we hope to host more of the ones that severed together! Thank you to the Knight family for your wonderful properties and for your exceptional customer service! Taylor, you are truly a rockstar in my book. If you are looking to book something special, this family owned and operated business will take great care of you!
title: The Perfect Veteran Getaway ~ Rockstar Company!
